policy: Author questions manually, then pass validation, QA, distractor review, prerequisite metadata and reuse gates. Automatic question generation is forbidden.

checks.label: Automatic question generation tools are removed
checks.detail: No npm script may invoke a deleted automatic question generator.

checks.label: Strict bank validation is wired
checks.detail: validate:strict must remain the schema/density gate.

checks.label: Question QA gate is wired
checks.detail: qa:questions:strict must keep prerequisite and no-fake-data policy.

checks.label: Distractor review is wired
checks.detail: Distractor review must sample deterministically and detect bad options.

checks.label: Remediation queue requires manual review
checks.detail: Flagged items must go through manual review, not auto-fabricated rewrites.

checks.label: Prerequisite metadata gate is wired
checks.detail: Lesson quiz keys keep question metadata connected to concept paths.

checks.label: Question reuse audit is wired
checks.detail: Learner-profile question reuse must stay audited.

checks.label: Pipeline policy document exists
checks.detail: CONTENT_FACTORY_PIPELINE.md must document creation, QA, distractor review and prerequisite metadata.
